title: Blob-URL death-loop in Model Library console (997 ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND)
description: Same revoked blob URL (blob:http://127.0.0.1:3000/a080ab53-ed40-4278-b00b-77c7a53a8b7d) re-requested endlessly with net::ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND â€” ~997 console errors while Model Library open (2026-07-13, during install/uninstall churn). Something renders a card/preview/video thumb from a revoked or dead-session blob object URL and retries without invalidation or backoff. Media/preview subsystem, NOT the download system (that is MPI-276). Suspects: video tile previews in MpiModelManager, preview bus data-URLs (MPI-269), or .preview-assets blob rendering (MPI-227).
